title: Spa Bathroom Retreat
short_description: A master bathroom transformed into a luxurious spa retreat with a walk-in rain shower, freestanding tub, and heated tile floors.
description: The homeowners wanted their master bathroom to feel like a high-end spa. We designed and built a walk-in rain shower with natural stone tile, installed a freestanding soaking tub, added heated tile floors, and finished with a custom double vanity with vessel sinks.
